channel.title: Boss Kev Curated Newsfeed
channel.description: Curated Malaysia, global, tech, and health headlines ranked by freshness and interest.

item.title: Doctors’ Duty Of Care Is Not For Sale — Malaysian Medical Association
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
MMA warns doctors against leasing their credentialing privileges to aesthetic operators or prescribing Ozempic and Mounjaro for weight loss without proper assessment. Such practices breach medical ethics, risk patient harm, and undermine public trust. The post Doctors’ Duty Of Care Is Not For Sale — Malaysian Medical Association appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Outpatient Overload: Can Private GPs Relieve Malaysia’s Public Hospitals? — Dr Mohamed Rafick Khan
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Scaling GP responsibilities is feasible, but only with coordinated training pathways, regulatory recalibration, and performance-based contracting to maintain clinical governance standards nationwide. The post Outpatient Overload: Can Private GPs Relieve Malaysia’s Public Hospitals? — Dr Mohamed Rafick Khan appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Teen Pregnancy Data Is Incomplete Without Abortion Figures — Dr SP Choong
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Dr SP Choong argues teen pregnancy data cited in a Ministry of Health report is misleading because it counts only hospital births, not abortions. He says the issue must also address access to safe, legal abortion and accurate information. The post Teen Pregnancy Data Is Incomplete Without Abortion Figures — Dr SP Choong appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), ministry(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Google opens AI centre as Berlin defends US tech reliance
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
German Chancellor Friedrich Merz's coalition has signalled it wants to make progress on the AI front as part of efforts to revive the struggling economy.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), law(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), funding(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Why Malaysia Must Use AI To Strengthen TB Control — Mohamad Arif Awang Nawi
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A USM senior lecturer urges Malaysia to use artificial intelligence to strengthen tuberculosis control. AI could detect TB earlier, predict hotspots, and improve treatment adherence, though challenges like fragmented data and limited capacity remain. The post Why Malaysia Must Use AI To Strengthen TB Control — Mohamad Arif Awang Nawi appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), who(+2), outbreak(+3), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Will US oil companies be the big winners from the Iran war?
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
NEW YORK, March 4 — Energy prices have surged dramatically since the United States and Israel launched their attac...
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
In defending the RM100k annual limit under the Base MHIT plan, LIAM claims that the average medical claim is only RM12,000, even though many ITOs in the insurance industry regularly tout policies with RM1m or higher annual limits for medical emergencies. The post LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000 appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), dengue(+3)

item.title: KPJ Healthcare opens centre of excellence for advanced neurology, stroke care
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The centre is part of the group’s plan to establish 15 CoEs by 2030, with the first being the Heart & Lung Centre of Excellence at KPJ Johor Specialist Hospital.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Guan Eng wins defamation suit against Zuraida
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
High Court awards RM50,000 in damages to the ex-finance minister over allegations made by his former Cabinet colleague.
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), court(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Ex-SRC director says SRC board only approved shareholder resolutions, unaware of RM42m transfer to Najib
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 5 — A former director of SRC International Sdn Bhd told the High Court here today that he had...
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2)
